lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you do here?

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: I's been making da machetes for Gabooty's shop Bwana!

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: If you want me to make you a machete we can do a deal if you like.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'd like to get a machete.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ok Bwana, here's the deal. There are three gem bladed machete types, in order of quality and hacking proficiency, they're ordered from low to high as follows.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ok Bwana, if you want to order the opal machete, I need 3 opals, either cut or uncut, 1 gout plant tuber and 300 trading sticks please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough trading sticks, sorry.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ok Bwana, come back when you have them.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ok Bwana, if you want to order the Jade machete, I need 3 jades, either cut or uncut, 1 gout plant tuber and 600 trading sticks please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough trading sticks, sorry.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ok Bwana, come back when you have them.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ok Bwana, if you want to order the Red Topaz machete, I need 3 Red Topaz, either cut or uncut, 1 gout plant tuber and 1200 trading sticks please.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: There you go Bwana, a nice new Red Topaz machete for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have enough trading sticks, sorry.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ok Bwana, come back when you have them.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: So Bwana, do you like the look of the machetes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you need gems?

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: They're tougher than just metal on its own, plus it's the only such resource naturally available in this region.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you need a gout plant tuber?

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: It's one of the harder to find resources which I mix with other ingredients in order to bind the ground down gem dust to the surface of the metal bladed machete.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: You can sometimes, if you're lucky, find the plant if you hack away at the jungle around here. You'll need to find a way to dig up the tubers though, they're the important part of the plant.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why is it so expensive?

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Expensive bwana, it's quite reasonably priced if you ask me. I can make it cheaper than Gabooty charges for it, that's for sure. And after all, I have to earn a living around here as well you know, I have children to feed!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I have to go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there anything interesting to do around here?

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Not that I'm aware of, just sit back and enjoy the sunshine bwana!

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Bwana, if anyone else asks me that question today, I'll explode! Go and ask someone else!

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: It's just village life as normal around here Bwana, always something interesting to find to occupy your time if you look hard enough.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Sorry Bwana, I'm already busy, why not go and talk to Murcaily! He's around the village somewhere.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Well, I think that there's some work to be done...perhaps Murcaily can help you. He usually tends to the hardwood grove to the east of Trufitus's hut.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've been doing some work around the village.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: I've already given you some trading sticks and I don't have any more on me at the moment. Why not go and talk to some of the other villagers and get some contributions?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, thanks.

sections.title: If the player is wearing a tribal mask

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhh - Get away from me you beast!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's the problem....oh, I'm wearing this big scary mask! I'd better take it off before I start talking to the natives.

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Waahhhhh! - It's da evil broodoo beast come ta eat my very soul!

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhh - It's a monster!

lines.speaker: Safta Doc
lines.text: Ahhhhhhhh!!
